textByHash.1f38f0a8f550c477d301f6ea10d2f2b4da5cd654: Monkeys these days... you'll be acting like one of those awful Gnomes next...
textByHash.227fd9c4d506191be8f1ae6777380ec2d97da2a6: The Marimbo Guard will kill you on the spot, foolish human!
textByHash.c2373426ca58488c1b3fa75c3e8850dabf905ed7: Get out of my way, you fool! Never again interrupt Denadu!
